array.string: cd "/Users/davidfiore/Documents/Hedge Fund/current-ai-hedge-fund"; export CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH="/tmp/aihf_swift_module_cache"; mkdir -p "$CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH"; SOURCE="/Users/davidfiore/Documents/Hedge Fund/current-ai-hedge-fund/desktop_ticker/PortfolioTicker.swift"; BINARY="/tmp/aihf_portfolio_ticker"; if [[ ! -x "$BINARY" || "$SOURCE" -nt "$BINARY" ]]; then swiftc "$SOURCE" -o "$BINARY" -framework AppKit; fi; exec "$BINARY"
